headline: Kirkwood Pulse • March 14, 2026
overview:
This article features a one-minute video recap titled 'Jupiter Minute' by Rob Rains, summarizing the St. Louis Cardinals game from Friday, March 13, 2026. The recap is available via a video player embedded in the article. game_result: Cardinals 5, Astros 4
weather: Overcast, 72 degrees
key_player:
  name: Colton Ledbetter
  role: Left fielder, minor leaguer recently acquired in trade
  performance: Delivered a walk-off two-run single in the bottom of the ninth inning; also had a single, a walk, and threw out a runner at second base
  comments: Ledbetter expressed excitement about regaining competitiveness and building confidence.
manager_comments:
  name: Oli Marmol
  remarks: Praised Ledbetter's performance and emphasized the importance of young players making their mark.
game_highlights:
  batting:
  -: Blaze Jordan and Ramon Mendoza hit back-to-back home runs in the fourth inning; Jordan's homer estimated at 422 feet
  -: Scott drove in the first run with a bases-loaded sacrifice fly
  -: JJ Wetherholt had a single in three at-bats
  -: Cardinals totaled five hits
  pitching:
  -: Kyle Leahy pitched 74 pitches, gave up 4 runs on 6 hits, walked 1, struck out 5
  -: Ryne Stanek struck out 3 in one inning
  -: JoJo Romero and Riley O’Brien each pitched a scoreless inning
  struggles: Pedro Pages went hitless in three at-bats with two strikeouts, lowering his spring average to .095
injuries_and_updates:
  Ivan Herrera: Missed seventh consecutive game due to knee inflammation; expected to return as DH before catching again
  Lars Nootbaar: No timetable for full baseball activities; undergoing diligent medical process
  Hunter Dobbins: Scheduled minor-league start rained out; rescheduled for Saturday
upcoming_game:
  starter: Andre Pallante
  opponent: Marlins
  location: Jupiter
  date: Saturday, March 14, 2026
  team_status: Cardinals will be visiting team
author:
  name: Rob Rains
  social_media: X @RobRains The Baseball Bash charity event took place at Spring Training on March 13, 2026, featuring baseball players JJ Wetherholt and Yohel Pozo. The event included photos and video coverage accessible via an audio player on the article page. The coverage was provided by Rob Rains from STLSportsPage.com.

items.title: Postcard from Cardinals spring training camp for Friday, March 13, 2026
items.excerpt: Minor-leaguer Colton Ledbetter delivered his second walk-off hit of the spring to rally the Cardinals to a 5-4 win over the Astros on Friday night in Jupiter. [...]The post Postcard from Cardinals spring training camp for Friday, March 13, 2026…
